desktopRequired: This conversation is end-to-end encrypted. Install the Harmony desktop app to read and send encrypted messages.
encryptedWebFallback: Encrypted message — open in desktop app to read
keyChanged: {{name}}'s security key has changed. Verify their identity.
channelEncryptedNotice: Messages in this channel are end-to-end encrypted. You can see messages from when you joined.
encryptionPermanent: Once enabled, encryption cannot be disabled.
encryptionDesktopOnly: Channel encryption requires the desktop app.
enableEncryptionConfirm: Enable encryption for #{{channelName}}? This cannot be undone.
verifyIdentityDescription: Compare this safety number with your contact to confirm their identity.
safetyNumberUnavailable: Safety number unavailable. Start a conversation first to establish a session.
verifyInstructions: Ask your contact to open this same screen. If the numbers match, tap 'Mark as Verified'. If they don't match, someone may be intercepting your messages.
blockedCannotSend: You have blocked this contact. Unblock them to send messages.
e2eeInitFailed: End-to-end encryption failed to initialize. Messages will be sent without encryption.
dmWebPlaintext: Messages you send here are not encrypted. Use the desktop app for end-to-end encryption.
